_comment: v1.1.1 — Sample annotations sidecar for the Edge Runner. Pairs with
factory.mp4 (synthetic test pattern; not real factory footage). The
purpose of this fixture is plumbing verification — generated tests
should be able to read the video stream, run inference, and surface
throughput + latency assertions WITHOUT depending on actual detections.
The annotations below describe what a real factory feed might contain;
downstream tests that use this file with a real YOLO model + real video
will get real assertions. Tests against the synthetic factory.mp4 will
skip the detection branch (no labels detected) and only the throughput
